phases.name: Foundation Pruning
phases.description: Strip redundant files, decouple context engine, and remove deprecated prompt builders.

phases.name: Passive Conversation Capture
phases.description: Establish a MutationObserver based watcher to silently glean AI logic without injecting code directly.

phases.name: Payload Normalization & Intent Profiling
phases.description: Standardize AI output into structured action intents and heuristically validate the active page domain.

phases.name: Batch Groq Mapping Pipeline
phases.description: Consolidate mapping resolutions into a singular batch API query, integrating DOM and screenshot targets.

phases.name: Decoupled Target Queue Engine
phases.description: Implement a background StepQueue serving as an async buffer boundary feeding the fast UI loop.

phases.name: Autonomous UI Tracking
phases.description: Build continuous passive target polling that auto-advances the inference queue asynchronously natively in the DOM.

phases.name: Significance Stability & Recovery Layers
phases.description: Embed native 3-tier failure intelligence and threshold-based DOM Mutation check triggers.
